name: Green Gypsy Thrift Shop
tagline: A curated thrift store in the old Waialua Sugar Mill — vintage aloha shirts, surfwear, and bohemian North Shore finds.
parking: Free lot at the Sugar Mill
bestTime: Saturday when combined with the Waialua Farmers Market
talkStory: Located inside the historic Waialua Sugar Mill that closed in 1996, Green Gypsy is run by a North Shore local who curates the selection with a surfer's eye -- vintage aloha shirts, wetsuits, bikinis, and bohemian jewelry at thrift-store prices. The Sugar Mill compound also houses Waialua Estate Coffee and the Saturday farmers market, making it a perfect triple stop. Pro surfers and surf photographers on the North Shore circuit are regular customers hunting for vintage finds.
